approach_settlement: Damage in footpath and kerb — existing approach towards Kankaria side
approach_other: Existing approach is not accessible from bridge side
sub_cracks: Crack/Damage in pedestal and Seismic Arrester in few locations
ss_spalling: Exposed reinforcement and spalling at bottom of girder in span P9–P10 and span P30–P31. Spalling at bottom of girder in span P41–P42.
ss_exposed_rebar: Exposed reinforcement observed at spans P9–P10, P30–P31, P41–P42.

A1.cracks: Observed — minor crack in dirt wall (Railway portion abutment RA1)

P5.honeycombing: Observed — construction defect: improper placement of girder
P5.any_other: Girder not properly seated on bearing

P6.honeycombing: Observed — damage and honeycombing in seismic arrestor; no gap between seismic arrestor and girder

BP1.any_other: Damage and honeycombing in seismic arrestor; no gap between seismic arrestor and girder (Gomtipur side)

RLY.A1-RP1.vegetation: Growth of vegetation in span RLY.A1–RP1 (Railway portion)
RLY.A1-RP1.any_other:
Corrosion in Steel Member
Looseness of Bolts at bottom of steel truss (Railway portion)

RP1-P2.leakage: Breakage of down-take pipe — span RP1 to P2 (Anupam approach)

P3-P4.any_other: Damage in both-direction expansion joint (P3–P9, Anupam side)

P8L-P8R.spalling: Exposed reinforcement and spalling at bottom of girder (P9–P10)
P8L-P8R.exposed_rebar: Exposed reinforcement at bottom of girder (P9–P10)

BP1-BP2.spalling: Exposed reinforcement and spalling at bottom of girder (P30–P31)
